caveats: Organization (Type-2) records only. No individual provider (Type-1) data. Identity and location evidence only — NOT credential or license verification. NUCC taxonomy codes embedded in NPPES require separate commercial license for taxonomy definitions/descriptions.
product_rule: NPPES data surfaces institution identity and address signals only. Never display as credential verification. Taxonomy code-set definitions require NUCC commercial license before display.

caveats: AAMC personal/educational use terms. Commercial use requires data use agreement: datarequest@aamc.org. HARD RULE: raw tables NEVER published. Reproduced table layouts are AAMC IP. caveats: ACGME DRB copyright notice states: 'No part of this publication may be reproduced or distributed without prior written approval.' This is STRICTER than the general ACGME footer which permits noncommercial reproduction. HARD RULE: any derived public display using DRB data requires ACGME written approval first. Do not publish DRB-derived statistics without review.
product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until ACGME written approval obtained. Contact ACGME before any product use of DRB-derived statistics.

caveats: ACGME footer: 'Reproduction and distribution with attribution for educational, noncommercial purposes is permitted.' Commercial use requires ACGME approval.
product_rule: Noncommercial derived statistics with attribution permitted. Commercial: seek ACGME approval.
